subject: A Super Saiyan warrior with upright spiky golden hair in an orange-and-blue gi, surrounded by a blazing golden and blue energy aura, in a dynamic combat-ready stance.
suspected_ip: Son Goku (Super Saiyan) — Dragon Ball franchise
description: A Super Saiyan warrior fills the frame from roughly mid-thigh up in a dynamic low-angle composition. The figure has the upright spiky golden hair of the Super Saiyan transformation and wears an orange-and-blue martial arts gi. Blue and golden energy aura radiates dramatically around the figure, with the blue element suggesting this may depict a Super Saiyan God SS or Blue-adjacent moment stylistically — however, the hair appears golden rather than blue. Arms are lowered slightly at sides with fists clenched, body slightly angled. The background is a wash of bright blue and white energy.
foreground: Super Saiyan warrior in orange-and-blue gi, golden hair, arms at sides with clenched fists
background: Blue and white energy field, radiant
emotion: Unshakeable resolve — stance planted, expression set, radiating power
